nameMeanings.name: Picot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Francois, Jacques, Jeanpaul, Luc, Pascal, Yves.  Spanish Esperanza, Aida, Alicia, Ana, Felipe, Luis.
French: from Old French picot ‘pointed object, pickaxe’, a nickname for someone who used such an implement. This surname is also found in Haiti.
Catalan: nickname from Valencian dialect picot ‘(sheep or goat) bell’.

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

variants.name: Picotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Honore, Andre, Jacques, Serge.
Altered form of French Picot , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Picot was born in 1150, in Brampton Ash, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Pouncy Picot. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1230, in Church Brampton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 80.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Picot(은)는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브램프턴 애시에서 Pouncy Picot의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1230년 영국 노르섬프토실르 c후르치 브램프턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.
